message:
Security audit: bounds checks, Unicode escapes, tape validation

- Add tape index bounds checks to all 8 WASM doc access exports
- Add comprehensive importTape validation (tags, string ptrs, container indices)
- Fix preprocess_json5 buffer overflow: use separate alloc instead of in-place
- Add \uXXXX escape decoding with surrogate pair support in ptScan/spScan
- Add UTF-8 multi-byte decoding in ptScan/spScan delta/live-doc scanners
- Fix parsePartialJson: return failed-parse when schema rejects complete JSON
- Saturating add in stream.zig to prevent u32 overflow
- Zero-initialize batch_buffer to prevent info leak
- Add 20 security tests covering all fixes
